title: RF generator alarm during etch recipe
description: RF generator tripped on over-reflection alarm mid-recipe on ETCH-07, process aborted.

title: Repeat RF reflection alarm
description: Second RF over-reflection alarm on ETCH-07 in 48 hours, same recipe step.

title: CMP-02 head pressure fault, tool down
description: Polishing head pressure sensor faulted, tool automatically halted, currently down.

title: Reticle alignment drift
description: Overlay metrology shows increasing alignment drift on LITHO-03 over last 3 lots.

title: Chamber pressure slow to stabilize
description: DEP-05 chamber pressure takes 2x longer than spec to stabilize before deposition start.

title: Minor particle count increase
description: Post-clean particle counts trending up slightly on CLEAN-11, still within spec.

title: Endpoint detection noise
description: Endpoint detection signal noisier than baseline on ETCH-07, engineer flagged during shift.

title: Slurry flow inconsistent
description: Slurry flow rate fluctuating outside tolerance on CMP-02 before the pressure fault.

title: Scheduled PM overdue
description: Preventive maintenance for LITHO-03 stage calibration is 5 days overdue.

title: Film thickness out of spec, one lot
description: One lot on DEP-05 came back with film thickness 8% below target, root cause unclear.

title: Drain flow sensor error, cleared on restart
description: CLEAN-11 threw a drain flow sensor error, cleared after restart, no repeat since.

title: RF generator preventive maintenance due
description: RF generator on ETCH-07 is due for scheduled PM per SOP, not yet performed.
